stonetop.summary: Thorn-spirits — Danu's little swords, drawn to defend her most delicate children.

system.concept: Thorn-spirits — @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.i0WjzHh0Ugynv2Tl]{Danu}'s little swords, drawn to defend her most delicate children.
system.description: Each thorn on a plant is a sword, brandished boldly against a world that would defile its flowers, steal its fruit, and devour its delicate buds. What, then, are the coedwaig? Only @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.i0WjzHh0Ugynv2Tl]{Danu}'s swords, brandished by the Mother herself in defense of her most beautiful and vulnerable children.
